column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a tray with matcha and wagashi" | TEXT="お茶にしましょう" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Eating a pink sakura mochi" | TEXT="美味しい！" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Sipping green tea elegantly" | TEXT="ほっとします" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Offering a wagashi on a small dish" | TEXT="どうぞ召し上がれ" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Looking at colourful wagashi with sparkling eyes" | TEXT="どれにしようかな" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Wiping lips with a small beautiful paper" | TEXT="ごちそうさま" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Blowing lightly on hot tea" | TEXT="ふーふー" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a traditional teapot" | TEXT="おかわりいかがですか？" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling with a tea whisk (chasen)" | TEXT="点てますね"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Clapping hands gently in delight" | TEXT="いただきます" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Looking deeply satisfied after drinking tea" | TEXT="至福の時間" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Cutting wagashi with a small wooden pick" | TEXT="上品にね" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Nodding while enjoying the flavour" | TEXT="味わい深い" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Smelling the aroma of tea" | TEXT="いい香り" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Looking thoughtful next to teapot" | TEXT="落ち着く…" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Laughing while holding a teacup" | TEXT="楽しいですね" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Surprised by the sweetness" | TEXT="甘くて美味しい" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Tilting head with a wagashi pick" | TEXT="おひとついかが？"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Waving hand softly" | TEXT="いってらっしゃい" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Looking happy with a sakura manju" | TEXT="春の味ですね" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Putting hands together in appreciation" | TEXT="ありがとうございます" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Looking shy, slightly hiding mouth with sleeve" | TEXT="お恥ずかしい" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Showing an empty plate" | TEXT="ぺろり" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Giving a gentle affirming nod" | TEXT="その通りです" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Pondering, finger to chin" | TEXT="そうですか" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Looking apologetic" | TEXT="お待たせしました" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Bowing graciously" | TEXT="お越しやす"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Looking up happily" | TEXT="いい一日" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Offering a seat gesture with hand" | TEXT="こちらへどうぞ" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Holding chest in relief" | TEXT="安心しました" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Crying small happy tears" | TEXT="嬉し泣き" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Gently scolding with a smile" | TEXT="もうっ" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Staring warmly into eyes" | TEXT="ずっと一緒" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Flicking hand lightly" | TEXT="気にしないで" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Thumbs up with tea in other hand" | TEXT="最高！" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Putting tea away" | TEXT="また明日"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Touching a decorated wagashi box" | TEXT="お土産です" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Opening the wagashi box excitedly" | TEXT="わくわく" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Holding hands out" | TEXT="貸して？" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Shaking head left and right" | TEXT="いえいえ" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Blinking fast in surprise" | TEXT="えっ！" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Pointing index finger up" | TEXT="ひらめいた" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Looking down, hands together" | TEXT="お手数かけます" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Patting someone on the back" | TEXT="大丈夫ですか？" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Looking back over shoulder" | TEXT="呼びました？"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Clasping hands near face" | TEXT="お願い" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Wiping table gently with cloth" | TEXT="きれいにきれいに" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Leaning forward with interest" | TEXT="それでそれで？" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Crossing fingers" | TEXT="祈ってます" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Yawning gracefully behind sleeve" | TEXT="ふわぁ" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Looking sleepy holding tea" | TEXT="眠くなってきました" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Stretching gently" | TEXT="うーんと" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Waving with both hands" | TEXT="ばいばい" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Dropping head slightly sleeping" | TEXT="スヤァ"
